attributes.description: Eco Recycling Ltd (Ecoreco) is the India’s 1st and leading E-waste management company, offering end-to-end solutions of Reverse Logistics, Data Destruction, Information Technology Asset Disposition (ITAD), Recycling of E-waste, Lamp Recycling, Precious Metal Recovery, implementation of EPR and CSR initiatives, Recycling on Wheels-SmartER.[1]

Eco Recycling Ltd (Ecoreco) is the India’s 1st and leading E-waste management company, offering end-to-end solutions of Reverse Logistics, Data Destruction, Information Technology Asset Disposition (ITAD), Recycling of E-waste, Lamp Recycling, Precious Metal Recovery, implementation of EPR and CSR initiatives, Recycling on Wheels-SmartER.[1]
